name: TN Brain · 4 · Monday Org Sync (pod + DM + consultants)

parameters.query: SELECT a.id AS account_id, a.name AS account_name, COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('id',p.id,'name',p.name)) FILTER (WHERE p.id IS NOT NULL),'[]'::json) AS projects FROM accounts a LEFT JOIN projects p ON p.account_id=a.id GROUP BY a.id, a.name;

parameters.jsonBody: {"query":"query { boards(ids:[1692810780]){ items_page(limit:200){ items { group{ title } column_values(ids:[\"dropdown8__1\",\"people__1\"]){ id text } } } } }"}
{"query":"query { boards(ids:[1118885420]){ items_page(limit:200){ items { id name column_values(ids:[\"role8\",\"team\",\"client_name6\",\"status0\"]){ id text } } } } }"}

parameters.jsCode: const org=$('Read org').all().map(r=>r.json);const cadB=(($('Monday cadence').first().json||{}).data||{}).boards||[];const cadItems=(cadB[0]&&cadB[0].items_page&&cadB[0].items_page.items)?cadB[0].items_page.items:[];const asB=(($('Monday associates').first().json||{}).data||{}).boards||[];const asItems=(asB[0]&&asB[0].items_page&&asB[0].items_page.items)?asB[0].items_page.items:[];const SQ=String.fromCharCode(39);const qq=s=>SQ+String(s).split(SQ).join(SQ+SQ)+SQ;const col=(cv,id)=>{const c=(cv||[]).find(x=>x.id===id);return (c&&c.text)?c.text:null;};const groups={};for(const it of cadItems){const g=(it.group&&it.group.title)?it.group.title:'';if(!g)continue;const pod=col(it.column_values,'dropdown8__1');const dm=col(it.column_values,'people__1');if(!groups[g])groups[g]={pod:null,dm:null};if(pod&&!groups[g].pod)groups[g].pod=pod;if(dm&&!groups[g].dm)groups[g].dm=dm;}const gkeys=Object.keys(groups);const stmts=[];for(const acc of org){const an=(acc.account_name||'').toLowerCase();let projs=acc.projects;if(typeof projs==='string'){try{projs=JSON.parse(projs);}catch(e){projs=[];}}if(!Array.isArray(projs))projs=[];const gpod=gkeys.find(k=>an&&k.toLowerCase().includes(an)&&groups[k].pod);if(gpod){stmts.push('UPDATE accounts SET pod='+qq(groups[gpod].pod)+' WHERE id='+qq(acc.account_id)+';');}for(const p of projs){const toks=(p.name||'').toLowerCase().split(/[^a-z0-9]+/).filter(w=>w.length>=3);let gk=gkeys.find(k=>{const kl=k.toLowerCase();return an&&kl.includes(an)&&toks.some(t=>kl.includes(t));});if(!gk)gk=gkeys.find(k=>{const kl=k.toLowerCase();return toks.some(t=>kl.includes(t));});if(gk&&groups[gk].dm){stmts.push('UPDATE projects SET delivery_manager_name='+qq(groups[gk].dm)+', last_verified=now() WHERE id='+qq(p.id)+';');}}}for(const it of asItems){const cv=it.column_values||[];const cname=col(cv,'client_name6')||'';const team=col(cv,'team');const placement=col(cv,'status0');const acc=org.find(a=>a.account_name&&cname.toLowerCase().includes(String(a.account_name).toLowerCase()));const accId=acc?acc.account_id:null;stmts.push('INSERT INTO associates (monday_item_id,name,account_id,account_name,project_or_programme,placement_status,last_verified) VALUES ('+qq(it.id)+','+qq(it.name)+','+(accId?qq(accId):'NULL')+','+qq(cname)+','+(team?qq(team):'NULL')+','+(placement?qq(placement):'NULL')+',now()) ON CONFLICT (monday_item_id) DO UPDATE SET account_id=EXCLUDED.account_id,project_or_programme=EXCLUDED.project_or_programme,placement_status=EXCLUDED.placement_status,last_verified=now();');}const sql=stmts.length?stmts.join(' '):'SELECT 1 AS noop;';return [{json:{sql,statements:stmts.length}}];
